events: Kim Gong-ja experiences Devil King's trauma penalty again
Estelle's full backstory revealed: saintess who healed by consuming diseases
Village burned by multiple kingdoms and religious leaders
Estelle consumed village remains and became monster
Devil King's wastewater is literal waste from consumed humans
Penalty: Ghost Road (Medium intensity)
cause_effect: Estelle's ability to heal by consumption was misunderstood as witchcraft
Kings saw her as threat to their rule
Religious leaders declared her heretic
Human cruelty created Devil King
Estelle's desire to save children turned into monster instinct
notes: Trauma penalty shows Devil King wasn't evil originally. 'Poor things' is Estelle's catchphrase. Wastewater represents corrupted healing ability.

events: Kim Gong-ja returns to 19th floor battle
Devil King is much weaker - level dropped significantly
Devil King's wastewater peels away revealing human form
Kim Gong-ja cuts Devil King's arm
Devil King retreats to 20th floor
Kim Gong-ja asks to fight 20th floor alone
Tower gives clear rewards for floors 11-19
skills: Power to change/strengthen any skill (not EX class)
cause_effect: Devil King's level dropped because his history of massacres was erased
Kim Gong-ja's 100+ days of fighting paid off
Apostle authority lets him communicate with tower directly
Choosing to fight alone for final confrontation
notes: Devil King's being is becoming fainter. Kim Gong-ja has accumulated massive rewards. Sword Saint and Witch respect his request to fight alone.

events: 20th floor boss stage: Estelle's hometown village
Devil King's power and nickname stripped away
Devil King revealed as small weak beast - Estelle
Kim Gong-ja points out Estelle's crimes: consuming humans, betraying mothers
Kim Gong-ja uses clear reward to modify Hundred Ghosts Summon
Skill evolves to SSS Class: Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation
Estelle's memories can be preserved in summoned form
deaths: Devil King form 'dies' as authority is stripped
cause_effect: History regression completely weakened Devil King
Kim Gong-ja's reward allows skill evolution
Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation preserves memories of killed
Estelle will be summoned with her memories intact
notes: Kim Gong-ja's strategy: kill Estelle to save her with Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation. 'Swallowing' metaphor - Estelle consumed others, now Kim Gong-ja will 'consume' (kill and summon) her.

events: Kim Gong-ja summons Fallen Constellation from shadow
Names her 'Preta'
Preta becomes Kim Gong-ja's servant
History changes - 20th floor revised
Continent's army appears to burn village again
Kim Gong-ja stops army using deception
Tower holds conference with Six Constellations about skill
cause_effect: Killing Preta and summoning her makes her his servant
Preta obeys to protect her village from continent's army
Constellation conference needed because skill affects NPCs
Six Constellations of Ten Thousand Lives vote on skill validity
notes: Constellations revealed as administrators above tower. Six Constellations vote on whether skill applies to NPCs. Owner of Ten Thousand Lives (1st Constellation) votes in Kim Gong-ja's favor.

events: Constellation conference votes: 3 for, 2 against, 1 abstain
NPCs are included in Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation
Kim Gong-ja returns to 20th floor
Preta cries as history reverts
Continent's army approaches village
Preta begs Kim Gong-ja to save village
skills: Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation confirmed to work on NPCs
cause_effect: Constellation vote legitimizes skill usage on NPCs
Preta's village is about to be burned again by history
Kim Gong-ja must use his authority to stop army
Preta's servitude is willing to protect her people
notes: Constellations are beings outside tower. They speak unknown language. Kim Gong-ja's temporary apostle authority taken away after conference.

events: Kim Gong-ja pretends to be Apostle of Goddess
Uses Holy Sword authority to command empire army
Makes Preta perform humiliating exercises to 'prove' she's defeated
General Sarbast believes Kim Gong-ja
Other commanders argue with empire general
Kim Gong-ja creates division among alliance
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's deception divides continent's alliance
Holy Sword gives him legitimacy with empire
Preta's humiliation is calculated to show she's 'defeated'
Internal strife prevents unified attack on village
notes: Sword Emperor teaches Kim Gong-ja about lying with confidence. General Sarbast is same NPC from 11th floor but doesn't remember. 'Lies mixed with 90% truth' strategy.

events: Alliance factions argue among themselves
Elf, Dragoon, and other factions join argument
Lizardman Magician proposes Soul Jewel test
Jewel tests soul's goodness/evil
Preta's soul shows pure black (evil)
Kim Gong-ja's soul shows brilliant white (pure good)
cause_effect: Soul Jewel confirms Preta's evil nature
Kim Gong-ja's pure white soul proves his 'apostle' status
Lizardman magician declares him 'Light itself'
Alliance convinced to back down
notes: Kim Gong-ja's pure soul is result of his righteous actions (saving people). Preta's black soul reflects her monstrous acts. 'Three men make a tiger' idiom used.

events: Kim Gong-ja claims all evil is already 'subdued' in his Hell
Summons 4000 skeletons to prove his 'Hell'
Shows Yoo Soo-ha as example of captured evil
Makes Yoo Soo-ha perform tap dance and Kazatsky dance
Chief Holy Knight finally kneels
20th floor cleared with zero casualties
cause_effect: 4000 skeletons represent all 'evil' Kim Gong-ja has 'subdued'
Yoo Soo-ha's dancing proves complete control over ghosts
Alliance convinced that witch is already punished
Zero casualties achieved on 20th floor
notes: Yoo Soo-ha's Kazatsky dance is comedic relief. 'Greatest lies are 90% truth, 10% lie' - everything Kim Gong-ja said was technically true.

events: 20th floor clear announced tower-wide
Witch teleports to 1st floor to collect internet articles about Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja ranked #3 in updated hunter rankings
Witch shows Kim Gong-ja news articles about his achievement
Yoo Soo-ha still dancing Kazatsky in background
Witch offers to manage Kim Gong-ja's media image
cause_effect: Clearing 20th floor in 5 days makes Kim Gong-ja world-famous
Witch's excitement shows genuine admiration
Rank #3 establishes Kim Gong-ja as top-tier hunter
Media attention creates need for image management
notes: Kim Gong-ja's first autograph request from guard. Witch went to 1st floor specifically to screenshot articles for him. Updated rankings: Sword Saint #1, Witch #2, Death King #3.

events: Top guild masters discuss Kim Gong-ja's future
Want to make him 'hero who represents tower'
Photo shoot for media - Kim Gong-ja uncomfortable
Heretic Questioner suggests magazine pictorials
Kim Gong-ja rejects popular star concept, wants mysticism
Witch advises on media strategy
Sword Saint helps Kim Gong-ja escape photoshoot
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's achievements make him symbol of tower
Guilds want to use his image for tower's reputation
Mysticism concept vs popular star concept debated
Witch's 'more than friend, comrade-in-arms' comment creates buzz
notes: Witch's ambiguous relationship comment is calculated media play. Sword Saint reveals he also had media pressure when #1. Kim Gong-ja values recognition over attention.

events: Sword Saint and Kim Gong-ja talk at bell tower
Sword Saint reveals his background: wealthy family, wanted to prove himself
Sword Saint destroys his Detective's Insight skill card
Chooses to trust his own eyes over skill
Kim Gong-ja gains Sword Saint's full trust
Goddess of Protection reveals she's actually the Holy Sword
skills: Detective's Insight (B-) - destroyed by Sword Saint
Holy Sword reveals she's Goddess of Protection
cause_effect: Sword Saint destroys skill because he relied on it too much
Kim Gong-ja's sincerity wins Sword Saint's trust without lies
Holy Sword reveals she's one of five sister swords
Goddess of Protection was sealed by Lefanta Aegim into five swords
notes: Holy Sword's real name is 'Idol' (First Sword). Other four: Pity, Prayer, Sacrifice, Salvation. Sword Saint's full name: Marcus Calenberry.

events: Press conference for 20th floor clear
Kim Gong-ja uses 'opposite of Flame Emperor' strategy for interview
Answers all questions humbly and politely
Reporter asks about guild conspiracy theories
Kim Gong-ja denies being raised by guilds
Witch ends conference with ambiguous relationship comment
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's humble interview style contrasts with Flame Emperor's arrogance
Witch's relationship comment creates media buzz intentionally
Press conference ends on positive note
21st floor opens in 5 minutes after conference
notes: Kim Gong-ja recalls Flame Emperor's 'Your father' scandal. Does exact opposite of everything Flame Emperor would do. Witch's 'more than friend, comrade-in-arms' becomes famous quote.

events: Countdown to 21st floor opening
Goddess hologram announces new stage
All hunters with Titles forcibly transferred to 21st floor
302 titled hunters gathered
Librarian Bang Gu-seok appears as Constellation
Librarian explains 21st-30th floor concept: books/worlds
cause_effect: Only hunters with Titles can enter 21st+ floors
Latecomers without Titles are left behind
Great Library contains books of destroyed worlds
Librarian manages 21st-30th floors
notes: Witch's father died in civil war when she was 7. Kim Gong-ja learns poker face technique from trauma memory. 21st floor is completely different from 11th-20th.

events: Librarian reveals 302 titled hunters
Books contain histories of destroyed worlds (Apocalypses)
Shows worlds destroyed by meteors, tsunamis, diseases, zombies
Quest: choose 8 discontinued Apocalypses to 'save'
Hunters must enter books and prevent destruction
Some hunters reject quest and attack Librarian
Librarian seals rebels in book
deaths: Rebel hunters sealed in bookmark form
Various world destructions shown (billions of deaths in visions)
cause_effect: Librarian is book fanatic who wants to see finished stories
Rebellious hunters are sealed as bookmarks
Only titled hunters can participate
Latecomers permanently left behind
notes: Great Library stretches beyond horizon. Books are actual worlds. Librarian can summon characters from books. Bookmark maids are former hunters who rebelled.

events: Kim Gong-ja receives 20th floor clear rewards
Blessing of Goddess of Beauty: see character favorability (21st-30th)
Blessing of Goddess of Vitality: see character psyche (21st-30th)
Hunters split into cautious and radical factions
Radical faction tries to attack Librarian
Librarian summons tentacle wizard from book to seal them
50 hunters turned into bookmark maids
skills: Character window: shows favorability, preferred genres, psychological state
cause_effect: Character window bonuses perfect for role-playing quests
Kim Gong-ja can read people's preferences and psychology
Bae Hu-ryeong's character window shows favorite genre: Martial Arts
Witch's character window shows favorite characters: Prince on White Horse
notes: Quest is live-broadcasted to Babylon square. Kim Gong-ja's bonuses give massive advantage for 'performance' quests. Bae Hu-ryeong embarrassed by his character window showing 'Mother' as favorite character type.
